MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES- RIOS GUSTOVA AND PAUL NEILY, TEL. NO. 828-3793, DEFENDANTS APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS GUSTAVO RIOS AND PAUL NEILY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND; PLAINTIFF STILL DOES NOT PLEAD COMPLIANCE WITH THE REQUIREMENT TO INFORM THE TENANT THAT HE MAY SEEK ADVICE FROM THE RENT BOARD.
